label: Quiet Anchor
shortCopy: Returning to steadiness in small, quiet ways.

label: Weather Watcher
shortCopy: Noticing emotional weather before rushing to explain it.
emptyState: More echoes will help reveal the weather.

shortCopy: Rebuilding gently without making the story simple.

label: Ember Carrier
shortCopy: Carrying heat near the places where something matters.

label: Threshold Crosser
shortCopy: Standing in a doorway between versions of yourself.
